testcase.name: test_product_create_with_dimensions

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 0.7 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd79fb288540>('weight') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd79fb288540> = {'product': {'active': True, 'brand': None, 'category': 'test', 'created_at': '2026-04-29T17:24:52.692048+00:00', ...}, 'related': []}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration18.py:201: in test_product_create_with_dimensions assert p.get("weight") == 0.7 E AssertionError: assert None == 0.7 E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd79fb288540>('weight') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd79fb288540> = {'product': {'active': True, 'brand': None, 'category': 'test', 'created_at': '2026-04-29T17:24:52.692048+00:00', ...}, 'related': []}.get
